Honcho"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Import all memories from ",["$","a",null,{"href":"https://honcho.dev","children":"Honcho"}]," into Mnemosyne. Honcho uses a peer → session → message model backed by PostgreSQL + pgvector. The importer iterates every layer and preserves peer identity."]}],"\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16"],["$L17"],"$L18"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@19"]},null,false,"$@19"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L1a",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$1b",["$L1c"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"w2V6K6EKWmEvKvxCYnnRM"}

7:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"One Command"}]
8:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"hermes mnemosyne import --from honcho\n"}]}]
9:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"What Gets Imported"}]
a:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Session messages"}],": Each message becomes a working memory with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source=\"honcho_message\""}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Session context"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"context()"}]," output imported with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance=0.7"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Peer identity"}],": Each peer's ID preserved as ",["$","code",null,{"children":"author_id"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"honcho_peer:{peer_id}"}],")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Session metadata"}],": Original ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]," preserved in metadata"]}],"\n"]}]
b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Options"}]
c:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Dry run to preview\nhermes mnemosyne import --from honcho --dry-run\n\n# Filter by specific peer\nhermes mnemosyne import --from honcho --peer-id alice\n\n# Assign to a channel\nhermes mnemosyne import --from honcho --channel-id my-team\n\n# Custom Honcho API URL (self-hosted)\nhermes mnemosyne import --from honcho --base-url http://localhost:8000\n"}]}]
d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Extraction Method"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":["The Honcho importer iterates ",["$","code",null,{"children":"peers → sessions → context() + messages"}]," to extract everything. Each peer's identity is preserved so you can query by author after migration."]}]
f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"SDK Dependencies"}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":"Install the Honcho SDK if using cloud:"}]
11:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pip install honcho-ai\n"}]}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":"Self-hosted instances work without the SDK using direct API calls."}]
13:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Identity Mapping"}]
14:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Honcho Field"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne Field"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Message content"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Peer ID"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"author_id"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"honcho_peer:{peer_id}"}],")"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Session context"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]," (importance 0.7)"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"User metadata"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"metadata"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Session ID"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Preserved in metadata"}]]}]]}]]}]
15:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Programmatic Import"}]
16:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\nfrom mnemosyne.core.importers import import_from_honcho\n\nmnemosyne = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"migration\")\n\nresult = import_from_honcho(\n    mnemosyne=mnemosyne,\n    peer_id=\"alice\",                # optional filter\n    channel_id=\"my-team\",           # optional\n    dry_run=True,                   # try True first\n)\n\nprint(f\"Imported {result.imported} of {result.total}\")\nprint(f\"Peers: {result.peer_count}, Messages: {result.message_count}\")\n"}]}]
